content.fact: The Legacy of the Force era begins with Corellian resistance to Galactic Alliance central authority and a widening secession crisis.
content.injection: At LOTF opening, frame the conflict as federal/secession pressure, not as a simple Imperial war. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Legacy of the Force Begins / Betrayal.
